response:
SOME EXPERTS BELIEVE MOORE'S LAW WILL CEASE TO HOLD AROUND THE LATE 2020S OR EARLY 2030S DUE TO PHYSICAL LIMITATIONS IN TRANSISTOR SHRINKAGE AND HEAT DISSIPATION ISSUES.
***
OTHER ANALYSTS ARGUE THAT THE LAW WILL NOT TRULY END BUT WILL EVOLVE AS THE INDUSTRY SHIFTS TOWARD NEW MATERIALS AND ARCHITECTURES THAT CONTINUE TO INCREASE COMPUTING POWER WITHOUT RELYING SOLELY ON DENSITY.
SOME
